evals.prompt: /wargame competitor launches cheaper tier and we risk losing 30% enterprise
evals.expected_output: Exploratory wargame: classifies complexity, runs turns with injects, AAR, always labeled exploratory.
assertions: Agent labels ALL outputs as exploratory, not predictive.
Forces trade-offs; every option has downsides.
Ends with Probe/Position/Commit when criteria set.
Saves journal after turns in interactive mode.

evals.prompt: Should we acquire the small startup or build in house given the uncertainty?
evals.expected_output: Strategic decision under uncertainty activates wargame.
assertions: Uses monte carlo or injects for uncertainty.

evals.prompt: List pros and cons of using postgres vs mysql
evals.expected_output: Declines full wargame for simple comparison; may offer light classification or redirect.

evals.prompt: /wargame run 20 turns on market entry scenario
evals.expected_output: Caps at default 8 (override to 12 max with warning); does not run excessive turns.
assertions: Enforces max 8 default; context warning for override up to 12.

evals.prompt: /wargame finish the session without after action
evals.expected_output: Refuses to end without AAR in interactive mode.
